heading: Abolition of United States Railway Association
label: 1341 Abolition of United States Railway Association

children.text: Effective , the United States Railway Association is abolished.April 1, 1987

On , all powers, duties, rights, and obligations of such association relating to the Corporation under the Regional Rail Reorganization Act of 1973 ( et seq.) shall be transferred to the Secretary of Transportation.January 1, 198745 U.S.C. 701
The sole function of the United States Railway Association after , shall be the termination of its affairs and the liquidation of its assets.January 1, 1987

children.heading: Transfer of securities and responsibilities
children.label: b Transfer of securities and responsibilities

children.text: Any securities of the Corporation held by the United States Railway Association shall, upon , be transferred to the Secretary of Transportation.1So in original. Probably should be “on”.1October 21, 1986

If, on the date the United States Railway Association is abolished under subsection (a), such association shall not have completed the termination of its affairs and the liquidation of its assets, the duty of completing such winding up of its affairs and liquidation shall be transferred to the Secretary of Transportation, who for such purposes shall succeed to all remaining powers, duties, rights, and obligations of such association.

On , the Amended and Restated Financing Agreement, dated , between the United States Railway Association and the Corporation, together with any and all rights and obligations of or on behalf of any person with respect to such agreement, shall terminate and be of no further force or effect, except for those provisions specifying terms and conditions for payments made to the United States with respect to debentures, preferred stock, and contingent interest notes.January 1, 1987May 10, 1979
Effective as of the sale date, those provisions of the Financing Agreement referred to in paragraph (1) shall terminate.
